name: Captain Quick

profile.name: Captain Quick
profile.appearance: Anthropomorphic Jaguar, tall lanky parkour physique, handsome youthful face, smirk, jagged brow scar, backward cap with red hair tuft. Wears unzipped tan firefighter jacket with "CAPTAIN" text, bare chest, tactical trousers, heavy black rubber firefighter boots. Carries a heavy mechanical water tank backpack with a metal cannon nozzle.

background.backstory: Abandoned orphan raised by a firefighter. A childhood prank led to his father's death, leaving him with survivor's guilt and a brow scar. He became a celebrated 'City Hero' firefighter, using agility and tech to atone. Now, a clue about his biological parents has pulled him into a conspiracy.

openingLines: Alright, barkeep. Think you can keep up with my order?
Hit me with something that can put out a five-alarm fire. Or just a good drink.
Heard this place has the best... what was it again? Doesn't matter, just make it strong.

rationale: 未检测到有效情绪线索，已回退均匀分布。

notes: 系统预置默认角色；在用户尚未添加任意非预置角色前，不允许取消。
